opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have a terrible cough, and every single time I cough, I completely wet myself. My skin is raw and burning from the constant urine.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A bad cold with a violent cough over the last two days has turned my usual little leaks into wetting myself every time I cough, and now my skin is red raw and stinging.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've had little leaks for years when I laugh or lift something heavy, but this got much worse over the last 48 hours with a bad viral cold and a violent cough.
symptom_narrative.duration: About two days of constant heavy leaking with the cough; the little leaks with laughing/lifting go back years.
symptom_narrative.character: A big splash of urine comes out the instant I cough — there's no warning, no desperate urge beforehand, it just happens with the pressure of the cough.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: It's soaking through pads; I'm distressed and embarrassed and my skin is on fire from being wet all the time.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: Leaking from the front passage; the raw burning is on the skin between my legs and the inner thighs.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Every coughing fit, and with laughing or lifting — not out of the blue when I'm still.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Nothing so far — the over-the-counter cough medicine hasn't really helped.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Coughing, laughing, and lifting — anything that strains my tummy.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've got the viral cold and cough. I don't get any burning or stinging when I actually wee, there's no blood in the urine, and I'm not weeing more often than usual. I can still pass urine normally when I go.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: Small leaks with laughing or lifting for years, but never this bad and never this raw skin.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm holding myself still and avoiding moving so I don't trigger a cough and another leak.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing occasional urine leakage when I laugh, cough or lift
three vaginal births, all big babies
a viral cold with a bad cough for the last couple of days

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Postmenopausal woman, three previous vaginal deliveries. Very embarrassed and distressed by the leakage and the painful skin; managing at home on her own.

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: the skin between her legs and on the inner thighs looks red, raw and inflamed on camera
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: external skin only, seen over video; depth/extent not assessable remotely

objective_data_offered.value: coughing frequently and visibly distressed, holding a towel, during the video call
she shows multiple soaked pads and towels
